# Wrench

## Tags
account, settings, spanner, diy, toolbox, build, construction

## Categories
account, development, tools

## Source
[Lucide v1.14.0](https://lucide.dev/icons/wrench)

## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::Wrench;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        Wrench { size: 20, color: "red" }
    }
}
```
